title: pandaca sambiranensis
intro: Pandaca sambiranensis, also known as the Madagascar periwinkle, is a flowering plant native to Madagascar. The medicinal properties of Pandaca sambiranensis include its high concentration of alkaloids, such as vincristine and vinblastine, which have been found to have anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat various types of cancer, as well as other conditions such as malaria and tuberculosis, due to its antimalarial and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Pandaca sambiranensis often involve the use of its leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions.
